plugins.name: ololand-dd
plugins.description: Institutional due diligence for Claude — deterministic financial engines, 246-category risk taxonomy, forensic QoE, cross-document reconciliation, and a flywheel that retrains from analyst corrections. Counter-positions Anthropic's native private-equity plugin.

metadata.description: OloLand institutional due diligence plugin for Claude — the underwriting layer above Anthropic's native private-equity scaffold. Deterministic financial engines, 246-category risk taxonomy, forensic QoE, and cross-deal learning for PE / M&A professionals.
